nasb.text: He restored the border of Israel from the entrance of Hamath as far as the Sea of the Arabah, according to the word of the Lord, the God of Israel, which He spoke through His servant Jonah the son of Amittai, the prophet, who was of Gath-hepher.

esv.text: He restored the border of Israel from Lebo-hamath as far as the Sea of the Arabah, according to the word of the Lord, the God of Israel, which he spoke by his servant Jonah the son of Amittai, the prophet, who was from Gath-hepher.

cnv.text: 他收復以色列的邊境，從哈馬口直到亞拉巴海，正如耶和華以色列的　神的話，就是藉著他的僕人迦特希弗人亞米太的兒子約拿先知所說的；

ccb.text: 他收复了从哈马口到死海一带的以色列边境，正如以色列的上帝耶和华借祂仆人迦特希弗人亚米太的儿子约拿先知所言。
